title: Trunk or Treat
description: A family-friendly evening of candy, games, and decorated trunks. Bring the whole neighborhood.

title: Book of Revelation Study
description: Our Wednesday evening verse-by-verse study through the book of Revelation continues.

title: Men's Breakfast
description: All the men of Bethel are invited for breakfast, fellowship, and a short devotional.

title: Vacation Bible School
description: A week of singing, lessons, crafts, and games for kids preschool through 6th grade.

title: Baptism Sunday
description: Celebrating new believers as they publicly identify with Christ in baptism.

title: Christmas Eve Service
description: A candlelight service of carols, Scripture, and a message of the Savior's birth.
